data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for email marketing integrations (Mailchimp, Klaviyo, SendGrid), but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use case mentions the need for email marketing integration, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to this specific requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the satisfaction of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of validation for email marketing integration functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
